restartValidation.acceptance: Counters preserved; no stale motion after resume
Initialized counters, alarms and motion state restored

tests.name: TR01 Startup and Homing
tests.expected: Safe startup reaches MANUAL with both axes homed
tests.actual: Startup, homing and MANUAL-ready state evaluated

tests.name: TR04 Jog Positive and Negative
tests.expected: Axis jogs both directions and stops on release
tests.actual: Bidirectional jog displacement and standstill evaluated

tests.name: TR05 Positive Limit Switch
tests.expected: Positive limit stops motion, enters FAULT, recovers
tests.actual: Positive limit FAULT and recovery evaluated

tests.name: TR06 Negative Limit Switch
tests.expected: Negative limit stops motion, enters FAULT, recovers
tests.actual: Negative limit FAULT and recovery evaluated

tests.name: TR07 E-stop During Motion
tests.expected: E-stop stops motion, enters FAULT, recovers

tests.name: TR08 Guard Door During Motion
tests.expected: Guard door inhibits motion, enters FAULT, recovers
tests.actual: Guard door FAULT and recovery evaluated

tests.name: TR09 Drive Fault
tests.expected: Drive fault latches axis error and recovers through RESET
tests.actual: Drive fault latch and reset evaluated

tests.name: TR10 Following Error
tests.expected: Following error is detected and recovered
tests.actual: Following error latch and reset evaluated

tests.name: TR11 Encoder Feedback Loss
tests.expected: Feedback loss is detected and recovered
tests.actual: Encoder feedback loss and reset evaluated

tests.name: TR12 EtherCAT Dropout
tests.expected: Network dropout inhibits motion and recovers

tests.name: TR13 Warm Restart
tests.expected: ADS STOP/RUN preserves counters and safe standstill
tests.actual: Harness established safe standstill for ADS restart

runtimeRestart.acceptance: Counters preserved; no stale motion after resume

tests.name: TR14 Cold Restart Defaults
tests.expected: ADS RESET/RUN restores initialized safe defaults
tests.actual: Harness established safe defaults for ADS reset

runtimeRestart.acceptance: Initialized counters, alarms and motion state restored

tests.name: TR15 Watchdog Timeout
tests.expected: Watchdog loss enters FAULT and recovers
tests.actual: Watchdog timeout FAULT and recovery evaluated

tests.name: TR16 Invalid Command Transition
tests.expected: Move command in OFF is rejected without motion
